steps.title: Identify the peak on the line graph
steps.content: Reading the line graph from left to right across the years 1989–1999, we scan for the highest point. The graph shows the population rising to 100 in 1991–1992, then dropping to about 75 in 1993, then jumping sharply to a peak at 1994 (approximately 150 chipmunks), before falling again. No other year reaches this height. That matches choice B — B is correct.
